accurate.why: The partial summary accurately describes the bill so far, correctly naming the HHS Secretary and the 18-month deadline.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims in the text that was produced.

states_purpose.why: States the purpose of four sections on cardiomyopathy and AED/CPR.

objective_tone.why: What was written is neutral and non-partisan.

coherent.why: The summary ends abruptly mid-sentence, making it incoherent and incomplete.

concise.why: The truncated portion is efficiently written.

correct_entities.why: HHS Secretary correctly identified in the text that was produced.
